name: OneRoster Core Demo Dictionary
plain_description: A working vertical slice of the platform data dictionary for OneRoster-style roster, class, enrollment, gradebook, and identifier data.

objects.name: Organization
objects.plain_description: A district, school, department, program, or other education organization.
objects.why_it_exists: Apps need to know where people, courses, classes, and enrollments belong.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this organization.
The OneRoster source ID used by the sending system.
The organization name people recognize.
The kind of organization this record represents.

allowed_values.label: District
allowed_values.plain_description: A local education agency or district office.

allowed_values.label: School
allowed_values.plain_description: A school building or campus.

allowed_values.label: Department
allowed_values.plain_description: A department inside a school or district.

allowed_values.label: Program
allowed_values.plain_description: A program, academy, pathway, or organized learning group.

fields.plain_description: The organization that contains this one.
fields.school_example: A school belongs to a district.

fields.plain_description: Whether the record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

allowed_values.label: Active
allowed_values.plain_description: The record is current and should normally be used.

allowed_values.label: Inactive
allowed_values.plain_description: The record exists but should not normally be used for new activity.

allowed_values.label: To be deleted
allowed_values.plain_description: The source system says this record should be removed or ignored.

fields.plain_description: When the source system says this organization record last changed.

objects.name: Person
objects.plain_description: A learner, teacher, staff member, guardian, or administrator known to the platform.
objects.why_it_exists: Apps need a stable way to refer to the people who learn, teach, administer, or support learning.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this person.
The OneRoster source ID used by the sending system.
The name shown in user interfaces.
The person's first or given name.
The person's last or family name.
The person's school email address.
The person's broad role in the education environment.

allowed_values.label: Student
allowed_values.plain_description: A learner enrolled in one or more classes.

allowed_values.label: Teacher
allowed_values.plain_description: An educator assigned to teach or manage classes.

allowed_values.label: Administrator
allowed_values.plain_description: A user with school or district administrative responsibilities.

allowed_values.label: Guardian
allowed_values.plain_description: A parent, guardian, or adult connected to a learner.

fields.plain_description: Whether the person can currently sign in or be used as an active user.

allowed_values.label: True
allowed_values.plain_description: The user account is enabled.

allowed_values.label: False
allowed_values.plain_description: The user account is disabled.

fields.plain_description: Whether the person record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this person record last changed.

objects.name: Academic Session
objects.plain_description: A school year, term, semester, quarter, grading period, or other calendar window.
objects.why_it_exists: Courses, classes, enrollments, and gradebook work need dates and school-year context.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this academic session.
The OneRoster source ID for this calendar record.
The calendar name people see.
The kind of calendar window.

allowed_values.label: School year
allowed_values.plain_description: The full school year.

allowed_values.label: Term
allowed_values.plain_description: A major teaching period such as fall or spring.

allowed_values.label: Semester
allowed_values.plain_description: A half-year academic period.

allowed_values.label: Quarter
allowed_values.plain_description: A quarter-year academic period.

allowed_values.label: Grading period
allowed_values.plain_description: A reporting or grading window.

fields.plain_description: The first date in the session.
The last date in the session.
The calendar year associated with the school year.
Whether the session record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this session record last changed.

objects.name: Course
objects.plain_description: A course template or catalog entry, such as Grade 6 Mathematics.
objects.why_it_exists: Classes are scheduled instances of courses, and course IDs help organize curriculum and reporting.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this course.
The OneRoster source ID for this course.
The course name people see.
A local course code used by the school or district.
The organization that owns or offers the course.
The school year this course belongs to, if the source provides one.
Whether the course record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this course record last changed.

objects.name: Class
objects.plain_description: A scheduled class or section where learners and teachers meet around a course.
objects.why_it_exists: Most tool launches, enrollments, assignments, and grades happen in a class context.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this class.
The OneRoster source ID for this class.
The class name people see.
Whether this is a normal scheduled class or another kind of class grouping.

allowed_values.label: Scheduled
allowed_values.plain_description: A normal scheduled class or section.

allowed_values.label: Homeroom
allowed_values.plain_description: A homeroom or advisory group.

fields.plain_description: A local code for the class section.
The course this class teaches.
The school where the class is offered.
The academic session when the class runs.
Whether the class record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this class record last changed.

objects.name: Enrollment
objects.plain_description: A record that says a person participates in a class with a specific role.
objects.why_it_exists: Apps use enrollments to know which learners and educators belong in a class.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this enrollment.
The OneRoster source ID for this enrollment.
The class where the person is enrolled.
The learner, teacher, or other person in the class.
The school associated with this enrollment.
The person's job in the class.

allowed_values.label: Student
allowed_values.plain_description: A learner in the class.

allowed_values.label: Teacher
allowed_values.plain_description: An educator assigned to the class.

allowed_values.label: Administrator
allowed_values.plain_description: A school or district administrator associated with the class.

allowed_values.label: Aide
allowed_values.plain_description: A support staff member assisting the class.

fields.plain_description: The first date this enrollment applies.
The last date this enrollment applies.
Whether this is the primary teacher or primary enrollment when the source makes that distinction.
Whether the enrollment record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this enrollment record last changed.

objects.name: Line Item
objects.plain_description: A gradebook column, assignment, assessment, or activity that can receive results.
objects.why_it_exists: Tools and reports need a clear gradebook target before they can exchange scores.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this gradebook item.
The OneRoster source ID for this line item.
The gradebook item name.
The class whose gradebook contains this item.
The local gradebook category for the item.

allowed_values.label: Assignment
allowed_values.plain_description: A task learners complete.

allowed_values.label: Quiz
allowed_values.plain_description: A short assessment.

allowed_values.label: Test
allowed_values.plain_description: A larger assessment.

allowed_values.label: Participation
allowed_values.plain_description: Participation or engagement score.

fields.plain_description: The date the item was assigned.
The date the item is due.
The minimum possible numeric result.
The maximum possible numeric result.
Whether the line item record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this line item record last changed.

objects.name: Result
objects.plain_description: A learner's score, status, or feedback for a gradebook line item.
objects.why_it_exists: Results are the bridge between assignments, assessment tools, gradebooks, and reporting.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this result.
The OneRoster source ID for this result.
The gradebook item this result belongs to.
The learner who received the result.
The scoring state for this result.

allowed_values.label: Not submitted
allowed_values.plain_description: The learner has not submitted work.

allowed_values.label: Submitted
allowed_values.plain_description: The learner submitted work but grading may not be final.

allowed_values.label: Partially graded
allowed_values.plain_description: Some grading is complete but not final.

allowed_values.label: Fully graded
allowed_values.plain_description: The result is final enough to show or report.

fields.plain_description: The numeric score earned.
When the score was assigned or last updated.
Feedback or notes attached to the result.
Whether the result record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.
When the source system says this result record last changed.

objects.name: Source Identifier
objects.plain_description: An ID used by another system to refer to the same object the platform tracks.
objects.why_it_exists: Different systems use different IDs, and developers need to know which ID came from which source.

fields.plain_description: The platform's stable ID for this source identifier record.
The kind of platform object this identifier describes.
The platform object that has this external identifier.
The outside system that created or owns the identifier.
The actual identifier value used by the outside system.
What kind of outside ID this is.

allowed_values.label: OneRoster sourced ID
allowed_values.plain_description: The object's OneRoster sourcedId.

allowed_values.label: SIS sourced ID
allowed_values.plain_description: An identifier from the student information system.

allowed_values.label: LTI context ID
allowed_values.plain_description: A course or class context identifier from an LTI platform.

allowed_values.label: LTI user ID
allowed_values.plain_description: A user identifier from an LTI platform or tool.

allowed_values.label: Email address
allowed_values.plain_description: An email address used as an identifier.

fields.plain_description: Whether the identifier record is active, inactive, or marked for deletion.

base_status.label: Active
base_status.plain_description: The record is current and should normally be used.

base_status.label: Inactive
base_status.plain_description: The record exists but should not normally be used for new activity.

base_status.label: To be deleted
base_status.plain_description: The source system says this record should be removed or ignored.

unsupported_or_deferred.reason: Highly sensitive demographic fields are not needed for the current roster/gradebook slice and should only be exposed after tenant policy, purpose limitation, and audited access rules are implemented for that data category.

unsupported_or_deferred.area: OneRoster User agent, profile, credential, password, and contact fields
unsupported_or_deferred.reason: The runnable model exposes directory-safe user identity and one primary role first. Relationship, profile, credential, password, phone, pronoun, and organization-role details have higher privacy and integration impact, so they need a dedicated identity/account slice with field-level authorization before exposure.

unsupported_or_deferred.area: OneRoster Resource object and resource references
unsupported_or_deferred.reason: Resource records overlap with QTI packages, Common Cartridge content, LTI links, and content licensing. They are deferred until the content/resource slice can preserve package lineage and avoid treating resource metadata as the actual content asset.

unsupported_or_deferred.area: OneRoster ScoreScale, Assessment Results Profile, and learning-objective result fields
unsupported_or_deferred.reason: The current gradebook slice supports line items and numeric results. Score-scale mapping, assessment-result profile records, and per-standard mastery scores depend on QTI/CASE alignment and assessment runtime choices, so exposing them now would create unstable contracts.

unsupported_or_deferred.area: OneRoster extended object fields, references, and organization values outside the core slice
unsupported_or_deferred.reason: The core runnable model keeps the fields needed for roster membership, gradebook joins, tenant isolation, and hosted smoke tests. Extra metadata, references, org-level values, subjects, grade arrays, periods, and API status payloads are deferred until full REST/CSV provider behavior and filtering/error semantics are implemented.

unsupported_or_deferred.area: Full OneRoster REST provider/consumer and CSV bulk-exchange binding behavior
unsupported_or_deferred.reason: The hosted demo is intentionally read-mostly and tenant-scoped. Full binding behavior requires production auth, pagination/filter semantics, write policy, certification fixtures, and operational import/export jobs beyond the current vertical slice.
